case_title: RISKIND, DAN et al VS KITT, DOROTHY et al

docket_entries.description: DEFT. REQUEST TO CONTINUE HRG DATE TO JUNE 28,2000 AT 3:30 PM SUBMITTED TO THE COMMISSIONER FOR APPROVAL. DEFT. PAID $10 COURT FEE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RISKIND, DAN ADAMS, GRETCHEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KITT, DOROTHY KITT, THEODORE $1,500.62 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,570.62 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KITT, THEODORE
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-31-2000, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUN-28-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT KITT, DOROTHY KITT, THEODORE
